nasb.text: The Chaldeans will also return and fight against this city, and they will capture it and burn it with fire.” ’

esv.text: And the Chaldeans shall come back and fight against this city. They shall capture it and burn it with fire.

cnv.text: 迦勒底人必回來，攻擊這城，佔領這城，放火燒毀這城。’

ccb.text: 而迦勒底人必卷土重来，攻占这城，将它付之一炬。
